title: KL Divergence: Properties and Intuition
relevance: KL divergence is fundamental to model distillation, RLHF, and understanding distribution shifts during fine-tuning.
hints: Jensen's inequality: for a concave function f, E[f(X)] <= f(E[X]). The logarithm is concave.
For a bimodal teacher and unimodal student: forward KL is mean-seeking, reverse KL is mode-seeking.
